parameters.query:
WITH stats AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(*)                                                        AS total_tasks,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'completed')                    AS completed,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'active')                       AS still_active,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'completed'
                      AND completed_at IS NOT NULL
                      AND due_date    IS NOT NULL
                      AND completed_at::date <= due_date)           AS on_time,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE priority = 'high')                       AS high_priority,
    ROUND(AVG(confidence_score))                                    AS avg_confidence
  FROM tasks
  WHERE user_id = '{{ $json.id }}'
    AND created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 days'
)
SELECT
  *,
  ROUND((on_time::numeric    / NULLIF(completed,               0)) * 100) AS on_time_rate,
  ROUND((completed::numeric  / NULLIF(total_tasks,             0)) * 100) AS completion_rate
FROM stats;

parameters.subject: =📊 Your Weekly Productivity Report — IntentFlow AI
parameters.message:
=

📊 Week in Review

Hi {{ $json.user_name }}, here's how your week went:

⏰ On-Time Rate {{ $json.on_time_rate }}%
🎯 Completion Rate {{ $json.completion_rate }}%
🔴 High Priority {{ $json.high_priority }}

💡 Insights
